description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. Colour blocked with faux python skin textures and patent shine, this structured piece is a wardrobe essential. Style this with minimalist angular silhouetted ensembles. Made of textured leatherette with metallic twist to open clasp Synthetic leatherette overlay on the base and handles with fabric lining Two patent leatherette handles One main roomy compartment with a zippered pocket and two pouches Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
